performance_overview: Through 16 sessions (inception 2026-06-01) Bull has 7 completed trades: 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade). Cumulative since inception: Bull -0.0612% vs SPY -1.302%, cushion +1.24 pts alpha. Today (2026-06-19) was the 5th consecutive no-entry session — APH opened in distribution (RSI 39.94, below EMAs) and PANW had ideal RSI (57.25) but insufficient volume (rel_vol 0.677) and compressed ATR (0.163%). Sitting out was correct; no qualifying setups emerged.
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — only consistently profitable bucket; this is the primary target range; enforce aggressively at entry (n=2, sample small but signal is clean)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — overbought chase entries have all lost; treat as hard ceiling
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — this bucket must be skipped entirely
overnight_hold_insights: Zero genuine overnight carries across all 16 sessions. Policy unchanged: profitable + trailing-stop-active + price>EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion all required simultaneously. No position has met all six criteria. The thin, extended candidate pool continues to prevent qualified entries, let alone overnight candidates.

SPY recovered +1.04% today (VIX ~17, trending-up regime — EMA-9 > EMA-21), but broad EMA misalignment persists across the scan universe. notes_for_next_session:
FOR 8:30 AM PREMARKET AGENT (2026-06-20). Book flat, equity ~$99,938.80, daytrade_count=0. NO open positions. 6 straight no-entry sessions (06-12 through 06-19). 

APH (PRIMARY WATCH): RS 1.306 (strong), VCP 0.739, 1.76% from 52w high, close $163.94. Breakout gate: above $164.15 (prev_day_high). CAUTION — was in distribution at open 06-19 (RSI 39.94, EMA misaligned); recovered with EMAs realigned by close. Must confirm: EMA-9 > EMA-21 > EMA-50 at premarket, RSI in 55-60 range (NOT above 60 per our 0/4 historical rule), rel_vol >= 1.3, ATR% >= 0.25. Vol dry-up borderline (0.865) — if vol expands cleanly on break of $164.15 this is the target setup. 

PANW (SECONDARY, LOWER CONVICTION): RS 1.131 (marginal), VCP 0.743, vol dry-up 0.682 (excellent), but closed at $287.60 ABOVE prev_day_high $284.20 — breakout already occurred. Re-evaluate with fresh 5-min premarket bars. If it gaps up further, do not chase. If it pulls back to $284-285 zone with volume receding, could re-set. RSI was 57.25 yesterday (sweet spot) but entry requires confirmed vol expansion (rel_vol >= 1.3). 5.04% from 52w high is further than ideal. 

CRITICAL RULES: (1) RSI 55-60 only at entry — 0/4 on RSI >= 60. (2) rel_vol >= 1.3 required. (3) ATR% >= 0.25 required. If neither name qualifies tomorrow, post attention alert and note 7th consecutive no-entry — the scan universe and filter parameters may need review.
